source_report.title: Stope 14E Shift B Ground Conditions
source_report.author: Site Geotech Engineer
source_report.notes: Shift-level observations captured during post-blast inspection.

geo_materials.description: Thin slick clay seam on the hangingwall contact.
geo_materials.identification_method: Finger smear test and low cohesion on scraping.
geo_materials.engineering_significance: Can reduce shear resistance where blocks are daylighting.
geo_materials.common_treatments: Scale loose edges and bolt across seam where practical.

source_ref.sentence: A slick clay seam was mapped on the hangingwall contact.

geo_materials.description: Rusty friable infill in persistent fractures near brow.
geo_materials.engineering_significance: Indicative of water pathways and weakened fracture surfaces.
geo_materials.common_risks: Surface ravel from weathered infill zones.

source_ref.sentence: Oxidized fracture infill was present in the upper left brow.

geo_materials.description: Soft residual volcanic soil lens at the excavation edge.
geo_materials.identification_method: Hand-dug sample showed relict fabric and high moisture.
geo_materials.engineering_significance: Lower stand-up time compared with adjacent intact rock.
geo_materials.common_risks: Local unraveling and sloughing after blasting vibration.

source_ref.sentence: Residual volcanic soil lens was logged on the east wall.

geo_materials.description: Highly weathered andesite with low point-load response.
geo_materials.identification_method: Breaks down rapidly under light hammer impact.
geo_materials.engineering_significance: Requires shorter inspection intervals in production headings.
geo_materials.common_risks: Ravelling and progressive loosening around blast perimeter.

source_ref.sentence: Decomposed andesite was encountered in the blast-damaged brow.

geo_features.description: Local ravelling pocket dropping chips from fractured brow.
geo_features.risk_implications: Escalating loose rock hazard for entry crews.
geo_features.treatment_or_mitigation: Targeted hand scaling prior to reinstating access.
reporting_expressions: Active ravelling pocket noted above the brow line.
geo_features.inspection_points: Check for fresh fragments and aperture growth every round.

source_ref.sentence: Active ravelling pocket requires targeted hand scaling.

geo_features.description: Open joint with intermittent seepage on sidewall.
geo_features.risk_implications: Potential loss of block interlock and reduced friction.
reporting_expressions: Wet open joint observed on east wall.
geo_features.inspection_points: Track aperture change and moisture persistence per shift.

source_ref.sentence: Wet open joint to be tracked with short-interval re-inspection.

geo_features.description: Over-fractured brow edge from recent blast perimeter.
geo_features.risk_implications: Higher probability of detached chips during scaling.
geo_features.treatment_or_mitigation: Detailed face mapping before further charging.
reporting_expressions: Blast damaged brow present after round 214.

source_ref.sentence: Blast damaged brow to be captured in detailed face mapping.

geo_features.description: Persistent foliation plane daylighting into excavation.
geo_features.risk_implications: Can form sliding surfaces when combined with weak infill.
geo_features.inspection_points: Measure dip persistence against excavation orientation.

source_ref.sentence: A foliation daylighting plane was traced across the crown.

strategies.description: Focused removal of loosened chips at the ravelling pocket.
strategies.steps_or_method: Scale from a protected position and clear debris before access.
strategies.application_conditions: Use when ravelling is active and localized.

source_ref.sentence: Targeted hand scaling required before the area is reopened.

strategies.description: Shift-by-shift re-inspection of wet joints and brow condition.
strategies.steps_or_method: Record change in aperture, moisture, and loose fragments every shift.
strategies.application_conditions: Use where active seepage or evolving cracks are present.

source_ref.sentence: Short-interval re-inspection scheduled for the wet open joint.

strategies.description: High-resolution mapping of blast-damaged and structurally controlled zones.
strategies.steps_or_method: Capture trace geometry, condition notes, and hazard annotations.
strategies.application_conditions: Use after abnormal blast damage or newly exposed structures.

source_ref.sentence: Detailed face mapping requested for blast-damaged brow sectors.
